Practise the present progressive with they are + verb-ing through short, varied grammar missions.

Fun in ClassUnit 2.2
There are: Are there any + plural noun...?

Student Login

What students will practise

🔤
Use plural classroom nounsmarkers, notebooks, paintbrushes, scissors.
❓
Ask about classroom objectsAre there any markers on the table? Are there any notebooks in the bag?
✅
Answer accuratelyYes, there are. No, there aren’t.
🧩
Use varied task typesNoun detective, inventory reading, error repair, transformation, and picture challenges.

EOW2 Grammar Practice — Unit 2.2

Fun in Class • Are there any + plural noun...?

🐾

Mission1/30

Streak0 🔥

Grammar Guide

Are there any markers on the table?
Yes, there are.
Are there any notebooks in the bag?
No, there aren’t.

Use Are there any + plural count noun...? Answer with Yes, there are. or No, there aren’t. Use plural nouns such as markers, notebooks, paintbrushes, scissors.

Classroom Word Bank

markersnotebookspaintbrushesscissorspencilscrayonserasersbooks
